title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: The video argues that OpenAI's market dominance has eroded as competitors like Microsoft, Apple, and Google have deployed alternative AI systems. It covers GPT-6 speculation, competitive benchmarks (Claude Fable 5 vs GPT-5.5), and OpenAI's recent strategic challenges including partnerships shifting away from GPT.
writeup: The video argues that OpenAI's market dominance has eroded as Microsoft, Apple, and Google deploy alternative AI systems, framing GPT-6's eventual launch as arriving into a more contested field. It covers GPT-6 speculation, competitive benchmarks (Claude Fable 5 against GPT-5.5), and OpenAI's recent strategic challenges, including partnerships shifting away from GPT. The throughline: market control, not just model capability, is the contested ground, with the AGI debate as backdrop.
